title: NCERT case and the hand that rocks the cradle
description: Over the course of its 76-year long history, the Supreme Court of India has passed umpteen legally incorrect and morally unacceptable orders. Many a time, the Court itself has criticised its past verdicts as being incompatible with constitutional morality or as plainly atrocious, deserving to be "buried ten fathoms deep". Many such orders have been passed in the past decade and will eventually be overruled, sooner or later. Such is the nature of the Court (and the human beings tha
